leadText: Mega Punch (Japanese: メガトンパンチ Megaton Punch) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. It was TM01 in Generation I and TM00 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Mega Kick, being the same type and having a similar name.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Mega Punch deals damage and has no secondary effect. Mega Punch can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 4 bonus appeal points if Focus Energy or Mind Reader was used in the previous turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Stad2 A Normal -type attack move. It is highly accurate and relatively powerful. G S C A powerful punch thrown very hard. R S E Colo XD A strong punch thrown with incredible power. FR LG D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Torchic and Togekiss can learn Mega Punch despite them lacking any visible arms.
